# Amalgam

> Amalgam is a software studio. We design and build software with your team, from strategy through delivery. Built to ship fast, stay safe, and keep running when agents are in the mix. We work with founders, CTOs, and operators from startup to enterprise.

## What we do

- **Founder Review**: 1 to 2 focused weeks. You walk away with an architecture map, a 30-day next-step plan, and a read on whether your stack is agent-ready. https://amalgam-inc.com/founder-review
- **Expert Guidance**: 2 to 6 weeks on one critical path. You keep a critical-path plan and an agent-safe release checklist. https://amalgam-inc.com/expert-guidance
- **Outcome Partnership**: Ongoing. Weekly operating review, live dashboards, and ongoing review of agent performance, cost, and guardrails. https://amalgam-inc.com/outcome-partnership

## How we build

Every engagement runs on the Amalgam Operating System. Six layers your team inherits:

1. **Read**: what's actually blocking the next move.
2. **Architect**: data, agents, APIs, and the contracts between them.
3. **Build**: software with guardrails from day one.
4. **Observe**: agents, humans, cost, and reliability in one view.
5. **Escalate**: precisely to humans, at the thresholds you set.
6. **Operate**: audit-ready, every day.

https://amalgam-inc.com/#how-we-build

## Trust by design

Security isn't bolted on. It's how we decide what to build.

- Agent guardrails by default (scoped tools, eval harnesses, human-in-the-loop)
- Full audit trails on every agent decision, tool call, and handoff
- Data boundaries (PII, residency, retention) wired into architecture
- Role-based access from day one
- SOC 2, ISO, HIPAA posture mapped early
- Defensible decisions: every automated action has a paper trail

Our commitment: if we ship it, your compliance team can defend it.

https://amalgam-inc.com/#trust-by-design

## What we typically build

- Agent-ready data layers (Postgres + pgvector, tool contracts)
- AI features shipped to production (with evals, guardrails, rollback)
- Modernizations and rebuilds without the death march
- Founder reviews and architecture maps in 1 to 2 weeks
- Team operating systems (delivery rhythm, escalation, observability)
- Products rebuilt end-to-end (strategy, design, build, ship, operate)

## Proof

- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/moodys: legacy systems modernized
- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/barclays-bank-us: platform rebuilt with no downtime
- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/sofi: AI feature shipped to production
- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/premier-financial-alliance: advisors kept in the loop
- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/pearlx: production health made visible
- https://amalgam-inc.com/our-work/confinity: a team that runs itself

## Three generations of software

We build for the third generation:

1. Software that responds (forms, dashboards, static apps).
2. Software that assists (copilots, chat surfaces, smart search).
3. **Software that operates**: agent-ready systems that plan, act, escalate, and stay audit-safe. This is where Amalgam lives.

## Contact

- Website: https://amalgam-inc.com
- Contact form: https://amalgam-inc.com/contact
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/ryan-amalgam-inc/30min

## Voice

We write honestly, in the present tense, in the second person. No hedging, no euphemisms. Short sentences. Fragments are fine.
